task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'File Operations' section within the TESTS document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The TESTS document is open in the main view, and the 'File Operations' section (under 'Test Cases') is visible and expanded in the document tree or main table.

task_completion.description: Verify a new test suite was created for the Document Template requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new test suite item exists under 'File Operations' with a heading containing words like 'template' or 'document template'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new test suite was created for the Import MS Word requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new test suite item exists under 'File Operations' with a heading containing words like 'import' or 'word'.

task_completion.description: Verify a new test suite was created for the Export HTML requirement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new test suite item exists under 'File Operations' with a heading containing words like 'export' or 'html'.

task_completion.description: Verify all newly created test suites are set to 'Draft' status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status attribute or column for the three newly created test suites explicitly displays 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: Verify verification traceability links are established for the new test suites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created test suites display traceability links (e.g., in a 'Links', 'Verifies', or 'Upstream' column) pointing to SRS-61, SRS-72, and SRS-76 respectively.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the application's graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the application menus, buttons, and tables, rather than using a text editor to manually edit the TESTS.json file.

integrity.description: Ensure the test suites were created as proper document items.
integrity.visual_evidence: The new test suites must appear as distinct, structured rows or nodes in the application's document view, not just as plain text typed into an existing item's description.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal scripts to bypass UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or command prompt should not show the execution of scripts (e.g., Python, Bash, Node) designed to directly modify the project's underlying JSON files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Document: TESTS. The agent must create three new test suites under 'Test Cases > File Operations'. 1. SRS-61: Heading should contain 'template' or 'document template'. 2. SRS-72: Heading should contain 'import' or 'word'. 3. SRS-76: Heading should contain 'export' or 'html'. All three must have their status set to 'Draft' and include a verification traceability link to their respective SRS IDs (SRS-61, SRS-72, SRS-76).
